hero.eyebrow: Zanzibar & the coast · handpicked day trips
hero.lead: Trade resort routines for real Zanzibar — sail a traditional dhow, wander Stone Town with a local guide, snorkel Mnemba reefs, kitesurf in Paje, or join a festival in Stone Town. Every trip is small-group, story-rich, and easy to book.

grid.title: Excursions — pick a starting point.
grid.lead: Every card opens into the full day plan, inclusions, pickup details, and booking notes. Filter by what you want from the island.
grid.empty: No excursions in this category yet — check back soon, or filter by All.

pairings.title: Combinations that work
pairings.lead: Some excursions pair beautifully across one or two days. Here's how we'd sequence them.

family.heading: Family-friendly
items: Spice Tour, Prison Island, Jozani — all ages
Children under 5 free on most trips

booking.heading: Booking & payment
items: USD, EUR, GBP, TZS — all accepted

cta.title: Ready to lock a date?
cta.text: Tell us when you're here and which excursions caught your eye. We'll come back within 24 hours with available dates, pickup times and a final price — no commitment, no chatbot.
cta.ai_planner: Or chat with our AI planner

private.a: Yes — almost every excursion can run privately for your group. Pricing scales (Dream Dhow private from $320, Safari Blue private from $640). Just ask at booking.

rain.a: We sail rain or shine — Indian Ocean rain is usually warm and brief. If conditions are unsafe (high winds, lightning), we postpone or refund in full. Your call.

pickup.q: Do you pick up from the north / east coast?
pickup.a: Yes — pickup from Nungwi, Kendwa, Matemwe, Kiwengwa, Pongwe, Paje and Bwejuu is included. Add 30–60 minutes each way to the day.

ramadan.a: Absolutely — all excursions run as normal. You may notice quieter mornings in town and many cafés closed during the day. Out on the water, life carries on. Be respectful with eating/drinking in public during fasting hours.

safari.q: Can I combine these with a safari?
safari.a_prefix: Yes — most guests do. See our

tipping.a: Tips are appreciated but never expected. As a guide: $5–10 per guest for a half-day excursion, $10–20 for a full day. Split between guide and crew.
